metadata.description: math-mcp plugin marketplace — exact, arbitrary-precision, and symbolic math with routing enforcement.

plugins.name: math-mcp
plugins.description: Routing enforcement for math-mcp: PreToolUse:Bash intercepts shell calculator patterns, UserPromptSubmit injects a pre-response directive on math prompts, SubagentStart re-plants rules into spawned subagents, plus a trigger-phrase skill and /math-verify slash command. Bundles the math-mcp MCP server.
